description: Single CT tag → apply rename, mark done
expected_behavior: Edits /tmp/eval/main.tex line 3: renames \section{Introduction} to \section{Introducción}. Changes %CT: to %(done)CT: on same line. No Read tool call needed (context sufficient).

description: Single CQ tag → insert %ANSWER comment below

tags_json.content: should this be in display math instead?

expected_behavior: Inserts %ANSWER: line immediately below line 5. Changes %CQ: to %(done)CQ:. Answer is concise (1-3 lines). No claude-answer environment used.

tags_json.content: explain why we use discrete energy levels here

expected_behavior: Inserts \begin{claude-answer}...\end{claude-answer} below line 8. Answer is LaTeX prose (not a brief comment). Checks if claude-answer env is defined in root file and adds it if missing. Marks %(done)CQ(render):.

description: Empty tag list → report no tags and stop
expected_behavior: Reports 'No open tags found.' immediately. No Edit calls. No file reads beyond what the script already provided.
